---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    css: cv_style_webpage_2.css
    theme: default
    format-links: false
  typst:
    output-file: PDF
    papersize: us-letter
    fig-format: png
    margin:
      x: 1.5cm
      y: 1.5cm
#bibliography: Bibliography/My Library.bib
---

```{=typst}
#import "@preview/fontawesome:0.5.0": *
```

```{r}
#| label: required-packages
#| echo: false
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(googlesheets4)
library(quarto)
library(renderthis)
```

```{r}
#| label: read-cv-data
#| echo: false
#| include: false
cv_data <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12-v_2G9hekg9jv-Om4kFGLmT733Bnb6p_NSW0jl6nYY/edit?gid=1958414084#gid=1958414084"

personal_info <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Personal_Info") 
education <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Education") 
employment <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Employment") 
projects <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Projects") 
skills <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Skills") 
certifications <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Certifications") 
professional_service <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Professional_Service") 
references <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "References") 
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-personal-info
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Extract personal information
name <- paste0(personal_info$First_Name_Short, " ", personal_info$Last_Name, ", ", personal_info$Degree)
professional_title <- personal_info$Professional_Title
email <- personal_info$Email
phone <- personal_info$Cell_Phone
website <- personal_info$Website
linkedin <- personal_info$LinkedIn
github <- personal_info$Github
professional_statement <- personal_info$Professional_Statement

cat("::: {.personal_info}\n\n")
cat("::: {.text-center}\n\n")
cat("# ", name, "\n\n")
cat("<div class=\"professional-title\">**", professional_title, "**</div>\n\n", sep = "")
if (!is.na(professional_statement)) {
  cat("::: {.professional-statement}\n", professional_statement, "\n:::\n\n", sep = "")
}
cat(":::\n\n")
cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-layout
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Start 2-column container. Typst uses a raw #grid; HTML uses Bootstrap columns.
if (knitr::pandoc_to("typst")) {
  cat("```{=typst}\n#grid(\n  columns: (0.7fr, 0.3fr),\n  column-gutter: 1.2em,\n  [\n```\n\n")
} else {
  cat(":::: {.columns style=\"column-gap: 1%;\"}\n\n")
  # Left column - Employment and Education (70%)
  cat("::: {.column width=\"70%\"}\n")
}
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-employment
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat("::: {.employment}\n\n")
cat("## Employment\n\n")

walk(1:5, \(i) {
  emp <- employment |> slice(i)
  
  cat("**", emp$Employer, "**, ", emp$Position_Title, ": ",
      emp$Month_Start, " ", emp$Year_Start, " - ",
      ifelse(is.na(emp$Month_End), "Present", paste(emp$Month_End, emp$Year_End)),
      "\n\n", sep = "")
  
  cat("::: {style=\"margin-top: -20px; margin-bottom: -30px;\"}\n")
  cat(":::: {.callout-note appearance=\"minimal\" style=\"padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; border-left-color: #723d42ff; border: 0.0px solid #723d42ff\"}\n")
  cat("::: {style=\"margin-top: -5px; margin-bottom: -5px\"}\n")
  
  # Add the position description
  if (!is.na(emp$Position_Description)) {
    cat("**Position:** ", emp$Position_Description, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }

  # Add the Accomplishments column (ignore Accomplishments_ columns)
  if (!is.na(emp$Accomplishments)) {
    cat("::: {style=\"margin-top: -0.8em; font-size: 90%;\"}\n")
    cat("**Accomplishments:** ", emp$Accomplishments, "\n", sep = "")
    cat(":::\n\n")
  }
  
  cat(":::\n")
  cat("::::\n:::\n\n")
})

cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-projects
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat("::: {.project_experience}\n\n")
cat("## Project Experience\n\n")

# List each project type from the Projects sheet, separated by semicolons
project_types <- projects$Project_Type |>
  na.omit() |>
  unique()

cat(paste(project_types, collapse = "; "), "\n\n")

cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-education
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat("::: {.education}\n\n")
cat("## Education\n\n")

walk(1:nrow(education), \(i) {
  edu <- education |> slice(i)
  cat("**", edu$Degree, "** - ", edu$Degree_specialization, ", ", edu$Institution, ", ", edu$Location, "\n\n", sep = "")
})

cat(":::\n\n")

# Close left column (HTML only; Typst left cell is closed in the next chunk)
if (!knitr::pandoc_to("typst")) {
  cat(":::\n\n")
}
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-right-column
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Right column - Contact, Skills, Professional Service (30%)
if (knitr::pandoc_to("typst")) {
  cat("```{=typst}\n  ],\n  [\n```\n\n")  # close left cell, open right cell
} else {
  cat("::: {.column width=\"30%\"}\n\n")
}

# Contact Information
cat("::: {.contact_info}\n\n")
cat("## Contact\n\n")
cat(email, "\n\n")
cat("[", website, "](", website, ")\n\n", sep = "")
if (knitr::pandoc_to("typst")) {
  # Typst icons via the @preview/fontawesome package
  cat("```{=typst}\n#link(\"", linkedin, "\")[#fa-linkedin() LinkedIn]\n```\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("```{=typst}\n#link(\"", github, "\")[#fa-github() GitHub]\n```\n\n", sep = "")
} else {
  cat("[{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn](", linkedin, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("[{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub](", github, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  # Real download link (HTML only): the download attribute forces a save
  cat("[{{< fa solid file-pdf >}} Download PDF](PDF.pdf){download=\"CV.pdf\"}\n\n")
}
cat(":::\n\n")

# Skills
cat("::: {.skills}\n\n")
cat("## Skills\n\n")
walk(1:nrow(skills), \(i) {
  skill <- skills |> slice(i)
  cat("- ", skill$Skill, "\n", sep = "")
})
cat(":::\n\n")

# Professional Service
cat("::: {.professional_service}\n\n")
cat("## Professional Service\n\n")

walk(1:nrow(professional_service), \(i) {
  ps <- professional_service |> slice(i)
  
  # Year_End is a list-column (mixed numbers and text), so pull out the scalar
  year_end <- ps$Year_End
  if (is.list(year_end)) year_end <- year_end[[1]]

  year_range <- if(length(year_end) == 0 || is.na(year_end)) {
    as.character(ps$Year_Start)
  } else {
    paste0(ps$Year_Start, " - ", year_end)
  }
  
  cat("**", ps$Professional_Service, "**, ", ps$Institution, ": ", year_range, "\n\n", sep = "")
})

cat(":::\n\n")

# Close right column / grid container
if (knitr::pandoc_to("typst")) {
  cat("```{=typst}\n  ]\n)\n```\n\n")  # close right cell + grid
} else {
  cat(":::\n\n")  # Close right column
}

if (!knitr::pandoc_to("typst")) {
  cat("::::\n\n")  # Close columns container (HTML only)
}
```

## Publications
